claude-local.focus: Audio preload shipped (1.7.9): first player preloads on page load, others on hover/touch — first play near-instant; shares loadBuffer cache with play(). Security closed: secret key rotated (old dead), team pass all-lowercase. Open: STR001 buy/donate URLs.
